creator: phoffman@proper.com
text:
There are (at least) two problems with the Makefile for /usr/ports/lang/mono:

- The MAINTAINER address is wrong. The mailing list has moved to bsd-sharp@googlegroups.com

- The current configuration emits a warning:
WARNING: USE_BISON=yes deprecated, use build/run/both

How-To-Repeat: For the first, try sending mail to the maintainer. :-) For the second, 'make'.
